testcase.name: test_get_mileage_entries_returns_array
testcase.failure: tests/test_mileage_api.py:37: in test_get_mileage_entries_returns_array assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 404: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
